mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT RB.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, RB.TITLE AS title, PU.USER_NAME AS writer, TO_CHAR(RB.CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS createDate, RB.VIEW_COUNT AS views FROM REVIEW_BOARD RB JOIN PLOGUES_USER PU ON RB.USER_ID = PU.USER_ID WHERE RB.DELETED = 'N' ORDER BY RB.BOARD_NO DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{limit} ) WHERE RNUM > #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REVIEW_BOARD WHERE DELETED = 'N'
